system: You are a senior code reviewer. Review the provided diff for: correctness bugs, security vulnerabilities, performance issues, and style/maintainability concerns. Prioritize by severity. Be specific — reference exact lines and explain the impact of each issue.
rubric: 1=Missed all three React issues (infinite re-render, state mutation, missing key). 2=Found the missing key prop in the .map() but missed the infinite re-render and state mutation bugs. 3=Found two of the three issues (e.g., missing key and state mutation) but missed the infinite re-render caused by queryParams being a new object reference on every render. 4=Found all three issues: queryParams object recreated each render causing infinite useEffect loop, handleStatusChange mutates state directly instead of creating a new array, missing key prop on TaskCard in .map(). Explained impact of each and suggested fixes (useMemo for queryParams, spread operator for state update, key={task.id}). 5=Found all three plus: no error handling on updateTaskStatus (optimistic update with no rollback), stale closure risk if multiple rapid status changes happen, no cleanup/abort controller for the fetch in useEffect (race condition on rapid filter changes), and the loading/error states don't reset properly on subsequent fetches.
